title: Fighting the Corona Recession: Our 7-Pronged Business Plan
summary: A real-time look at the 7-pronged business plan put together in March 2020 as the pandemic hit.
show_notes_text:
### The Deadly Impact of Coronavirus on the Global Economy

- Example 1: When this episode was published, millions had already applied for social security benefits in the US.
- Example 2: Several entrepreneur friends of Irfan's reported losing 50-80% of their revenue. Irfan's own agency DMR was no exception.

### The 7-Pronged Business Plan

Irfan shares his company's proactive, 7-part plan for battling the corona recession — designed to help their business survive and ideally thrive despite the global economic shock.

The plan covers how the team at DMR (Irfan's digital marketing agency) is adapting their operations, client relationships, and growth strategy in response to COVID-19.

(The full 7-part breakdown is delivered in the episode — see the Anchor/Spotify/Apple links above.)
transcript_text: No transcript available for this episode.
